lastSummary: Started today's daily note and recorded the 9:00-10:00 AM EDT callback window after finding no new main-session user-facing product/task work.

Captured passive activity instead: the closeout recovery worker bootstrapped at 9:58 AM EDT, main re-anchored at 9:45 AM EDT, and the queued closeout log still shows the latest delayed dispatch completing at 9:44 AM EDT.
Reviewed both long-lived Discord branch state files, found no pending shared-important promotions, and refreshed their review stamps before the immediate git auto-sync step.
